name: upliftgha
description: Set up, migrate, or audit GitHub Actions CI/CD for a repo — including converting a Jenkins pipeline to GHA, or building one from scratch. Routes to the sibling vercel-gha-deploy plugin for Vercel frontends and always wires in upliftcontrolversion's version-tag contract; owns the AWS EC2 (docker-compose) and ECS (Fargate + ECR) deploy shapes directly.
